# QGIS Build Dependencies for Linux

The libraries in this folder are retrieved from the actual QGIS packages available on the archive repository.

For example, you can get them using `sudo apt install qgis-dev`.
To save you the hassle of having to pick the right version, I copied some of the versions I used into this repository. If you want to use the system-installed libraries, you can find them in `/usr/lib/` and `/usr/include/qgis`.
It would be nice to have an automated way to download and install the right version of `qgis-dev`, but I haven't investigated into that direction yet.
